title: Rocket Lab Corporation (RKLB) Secures Second Largest $190M HASTE DoD Contract
text: Rocket Lab Corporation (NASDAQ: RKLB) announced a significant $190 million contract award on March 23 for HASTE (hypersonic flight testing) launches. The company describes this as the single largest launch contract in the company's history, expanding its total launch backlog to over 70 missions. Under this Department of Defense initiative, Rocket Lab will support accelerated hypersonic flight testing across a four-year period. The arrangement represents a multi-year partnership leveraging the company's demonstrated capabilities in delivering high-cadence hypersonic operations. The company maintains a perfect track record, having achieved 100% mission success rate across all HASTE launches. Recent performance metrics show momentum in commercial demand, with the firm selling 28 new launches during the first quarter of 2026—approaching annual sales from the previous year. Beyond launch services, Rocket Lab operates as a defense contractor for the U.S. Space Development Agency, manufacturing 18 missile-tracking satellites. The company specializes in rapid-response satellite deployment via its Electron rockets and supplies military-grade space systems.
